howItWorks.title: How Tiklo works
howItWorks.subtitle: Everything you need to create, manage, and sell tickets for your event — in minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up with your email and create a password — no approval needed. Your organiser account is ready immediately.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Fill in your event details: title, date, city, cover photo, and community tag. Everything is editable until you publish.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Add one or more ticket types — General, VIP, Early Bird, etc. Set a price (minimum $5.00) or mark them as free. Set your capacity per type.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Once you're happy, submit your event. It enters a pending state and Tiklo reviews it — usually within 24 hours. You'll be notified when it's approved.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Once approved, your event is published and buyers can purchase tickets. Track sales, revenue, and attendance in real time from your dashboard.
howItWorks.doorDesc: From your event dashboard, download a branded QR code poster. Print it or display it at the entrance. Guests scan it with their phone, land on your event page, and complete their purchase in seconds — no cash, no manual tracking.
howItWorks.faq1A: Tiklo charges a service fee of {{percent}}% + ${{flat}} per ticket, paid by the buyer on top of your ticket price. You always receive the full face value of every ticket sold. Free events have no fees.
howItWorks.faq2Q: What is the minimum ticket price?
howItWorks.faq2A: Paid tickets must be priced at $5.00 or more. There is no minimum for free tickets.
howItWorks.faq3A: Yes. Set the ticket price to $0 when creating your ticket type. Free tickets have no service fee.
howItWorks.faq4Q: How long does the approval process take?
howItWorks.faq4A: Most events are reviewed within 24 hours. You will receive an email notification once your event is approved or if changes are needed.
howItWorks.faq5Q: Why might my event be rejected?
howItWorks.faq5A: Events may be sent back to draft if the description is incomplete, the cover image is missing or low quality, the event details are unclear, or the content does not meet our community guidelines. You can make edits and resubmit.
howItWorks.faq6Q: How do buyers receive their tickets?
howItWorks.faq6A: After a successful purchase, buyers receive a confirmation email with a PDF ticket attachment. Each ticket has a unique QR code that can be scanned at the door.
howItWorks.faq7Q: Can I edit my event after publishing?
howItWorks.faq7A: Yes. You can update your event details at any time from your dashboard. Changes to ticket prices or types after sales have started are not recommended as they may confuse existing buyers.
howItWorks.faq8Q: How do I cancel an event?
howItWorks.faq8A: Go to your event in the dashboard and contact Tiklo support to cancel. We will handle buyer notifications and coordinate any refunds.
howItWorks.faq9Q: When and how do I receive my payout?
howItWorks.faq9A: Tiklo processes organiser payouts manually after your event. You receive the full face value of all tickets sold. Reach out to us at support@tiklo.ca after your event to initiate your payout.
howItWorks.faq10Q: What is the door sales QR poster?
howItWorks.faq10A: From your event dashboard, you can download a branded QR code poster to display at the venue entrance. Guests who haven't bought a ticket can scan it to purchase on the spot from their phone.

footer.tagline: The easiest way to create, promote, and sell tickets for any event across Canada.

why.title: Everything you need to sell tickets
why.subtitle: Built for Canadian cultural events, community gatherings, and independent organizers.
why.feature1Desc: Create and publish your event in minutes. Add ticket types, set prices, go live.
why.feature2Desc: Scan attendees at the door with any phone — no app needed.
why.feature3Desc: Stripe-powered checkout. Funds go directly to your bank account.
why.feature4Desc: Attendees get ticket confirmation, 7-day, and 24-hour reminders automatically.
why.feature5Desc: Watch ticket sales, revenue, and attendance update live from your dashboard.
why.feature6Desc: Only pay when you sell tickets — no subscription, no setup cost. Free events are always free.
